## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature within the documented scope
- [ ] Tests or reliability improvement
- [ ] Documentation or project maintenance

## Verification

List every command or test run and its result. If a check was not run, explain why.

```text
Not run yet
```

## Manual Mac testing

Describe the Mac hardware, macOS version, display arrangement, permission state, settings, and result. Write `Not applicable` for documentation-only changes or `Not run` when physical Mac testing remains required.

## Scope, privacy, and safety checklist

- [ ] I kept this change focused on the documented GifJot workflow.
- [ ] I added or updated deterministic tests for changed logic, or explained why none are needed.
- [ ] I kept capture callbacks and the UI thread free of heavy image, encoding, and disk work.
- [ ] I preserved bounded frame queues and temporary-file cleanup where applicable.
- [ ] I did not add network access, telemetry, an unnecessary permission, or sensitive logging.
- [ ] I documented any dependency, license, bundle-size, maintenance, privacy, or permission impact.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, signing material, private recordings, personal paths, or other sensitive data.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for a user-visible or contributor-visible change, or this is not applicable.

## Reviewer notes

Call out risky areas, known limitations, follow-up work, or checks that still require a real Mac.
